# Interface Contracts: Wheel Viewer — Definition-Quality Pass

**Purpose**: Single source of truth for function signatures and type definitions touched by this PR. All implementation MUST match these signatures exactly.

**Generated by**: /plan (Phase 1: Design & Contracts)
**Consumed by**: /implement (all tasks MUST match these signatures)

## Rules

- Every function listed here MUST exist with the exact name and argument order shown.
- All public functions exported from `viewer/src/lib/*.ts` are **synchronous** unless explicitly marked `async`. Pure-function modules (`lint.ts`, `diff.ts`, `layout.ts`) MUST NOT perform I/O.
- All type definitions are exported from their owning module and re-exported from `viewer/src/lib/types.ts` only when consumed by component files outside `lib/`.
- Determinism: `lintWorkflow`, `diffWorkflows`, `buildLayout` MUST produce byte-identical output for byte-identical input (sort orders fixed; no `Date.now()` or `Math.random()` in any path).
- Every function MUST reference its spec FR in a top-of-function comment, e.g. `// FR-4.4 — pure, deterministic, no I/O`.

---

## Module: `viewer/src/lib/types.ts` (extended)

### Existing types — NO changes

`Project`, `Step` (existing fields preserved), `WorkflowsResponse`, `WorkflowGroup`, `FeedbackLoop`, `FeedbackLoopStep`, `FeedbackLoopsResponse` — all unchanged.

### Extended: `StepType` (FR-2.1)

```ts
export type StepType =
  | 'command'
  | 'agent'
  | 'workflow'
  | 'branch'
  | 'loop'
  | 'parallel'
  | 'approval'
  | 'team-create'
  | 'team-wait'
  | 'team-delete'
  | 'teammate'
```

### Extended: `Workflow` (FR-6.3)

```ts
export interface Workflow {
  name: string
  description?: string
  path: string
  source: 'local' | 'plugin'
  plugin?: string
  version?: string
  stepCount: number
  steps: Step[]
  localOverride: boolean
  // NEW: discovery origin. Optional for backwards compatibility.
  // 'installed' = found via ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json.
  // 'source'    = found via projectPath/plugin-*/ scan (FR-6.2).
  // 'local'     = local workflow under projectPath/workflows/.
  // Omitted on legacy callers that don't set it.
  discoveryMode?: 'installed' | 'source' | 'local'
}
```

### Extended: `Step` — `team_name` and `team` fields (already informally present, formalize)

```ts
export interface Step {
  // ... existing fields preserved (id, type, description, instruction, prompt, agent,
  //     agent_type, agents, agent_instructions, model, allow_user_input,
  //     contract_emitted, command, workflow_name, workflow_plugin, condition,
  //     if_zero, if_nonzero, max_iterations, on_exhaustion, substep, inputs,
  //     output, output_schema, context_from, requires_plugins, on_error, skip,
  //     message, terminal, steps)

  // FR-2.3 — team-step fields (formalize what currently lives in agent: Record)
  team_name?: string                 // team-create
  team?: string                      // team-wait, team-delete, teammate
  workflow?: string                  // teammate — sub-workflow path
  assign?: Record<string, unknown>   // teammate
  workflow_definition?: Record<string, unknown>  // teammate — inline expansion (RightPanel)
}
```

## Module: `viewer/src/lib/lint.ts` (NEW — FR-4)

```ts
import type { Workflow } from './types'

export type LintSeverity = 'error' | 'warning'

export interface LintIssue {
  severity: LintSeverity
  stepId: string         // empty string for workflow-level issues (e.g. duplicate IDs surfaced once)
  ruleId:                // L-001..L-010 (string union, not enum, for forward-compat)
    | 'L-001' | 'L-002' | 'L-003' | 'L-004' | 'L-005'
    | 'L-006' | 'L-007' | 'L-008' | 'L-009' | 'L-010'
  message: string
}

export interface LintContext {
  // Snapshot of installed_plugins.json keys. Empty array = unknown / not loaded.
  installedPlugins: string[]
  // Source-discovered plugin short names. Used to gate L-007 (warning).
  sourceDiscoveredPlugins: string[]
}

/**
 * FR-4.4 — Pure, deterministic, synchronous. No I/O.
 *
 * Returns lint issues sorted: errors before warnings, then by step index, then by ruleId.
 *
 * If `ctx` is omitted, L-007 (requires_plugins reference check) is skipped (NOT failed).
 */
export function lintWorkflow(wf: Workflow, ctx?: LintContext): LintIssue[]

/**
 * Helper: derive a workflow-level severity badge from a list of issues.
 * Used by Sidebar to render the green-check / yellow-triangle / red-X badge.
 *
 * Returns 'error' if any issue.severity === 'error',
 *         'warning' if any issue.severity === 'warning' (and zero errors),
 *         'clean' otherwise.
 */
export type LintBadge = 'clean' | 'warning' | 'error'
export function workflowLintBadge(issues: LintIssue[]): LintBadge
```

### Lint rule reference (one of L-001..L-010 per issue)

| Rule | Severity | Description |
|---|---|---|
| L-001 | error | Step has no `id` (or empty string) |
| L-002 | error | Step `type` is missing or not a member of the StepType union |
| L-003 | error | `branch` step's `if_zero` / `if_nonzero` target does not resolve to a sibling step `id` |
| L-004 | error | Step's `skip` target does not resolve to a sibling step `id` |
| L-005 | error | `loop` step has no `substep` defined |
| L-006 | error | Two or more steps in the workflow share the same `id` |
| L-007 | warning | A `requires_plugins` entry is not in `ctx.installedPlugins` AND not in `ctx.sourceDiscoveredPlugins` |
| L-008 | warning | `team-create` step is missing `team_name` |
| L-009 | warning | `teammate` step is missing one of `team` / `workflow` / `assign` |
| L-010 | warning | `team-wait` step's `team` ref doesn't match any prior `team-create` step in the same workflow |

---

## Module: `viewer/src/lib/diff.ts` (NEW — FR-5)

```ts
import type { Step, Workflow } from './types'

export interface FieldDiff {
  /** Dot-path within the step, e.g. "agent.model" or "if_zero". */
  path: string
  left: unknown
  right: unknown
}

export interface ModifiedStep {
  /** The shared step id. */
  id: string
  leftStep: Step
  rightStep: Step
  /** Sorted by path ascending. */
  fieldDiff: FieldDiff[]
}

export interface WorkflowDiff {
  /** Steps in `right` but not `left`, by id. Order preserves their order in right.steps. */
  added: Step[]
  /** Steps in `left` but not `right`, by id. Order preserves their order in left.steps. */
  removed: Step[]
  /** Steps with the same id on both sides whose JSON content differs. */
  modified: ModifiedStep[]
  /** Steps that are deep-equal on both sides. Order preserves their order in left.steps. */
  unchanged: Step[]
}

/**
 * FR-5.3 — Step alignment uses `id` as the join key. Steps without an `id`
 * fall back to index-pairing only when both sides have an unidentified step
 * at the same index; otherwise they show as added/removed.
 *
 * Pure, deterministic, synchronous.
 */
export function diffWorkflows(left: Workflow, right: Workflow): WorkflowDiff
```

---

## Module: `viewer/src/lib/layout.ts` (NEW — FR-1)

```ts
import type { Step, Workflow } from './types'

export interface GraphNode {
  id: string                         // step.id, OR generated for sub-DAG nodes
  position: { x: number; y: number }
  data: {
    step: Step
    rank: number                     // 0-indexed layered rank
    isExpanded?: boolean             // true for sub-DAG roots
    isSubDAGChild?: boolean          // true for children of an expanded sub-workflow
  }
  type?: string                      // React Flow node type — 'workflowNode' (default)
}

export interface GraphEdge {
  id: string
  source: string                     // GraphNode.id
  target: string                     // GraphNode.id
  data?: {
    kind: 'next' | 'branch-zero' | 'branch-nonzero' | 'skip' | 'loop-back' | 'expanded' | 'team-fan-in'
    label?: string                   // e.g. "if_zero", "loop"
  }
  type?: string                      // React Flow edge type — 'default' (most), 'expanded' (dashed-cyan)
  className?: string
  animated?: boolean
}

export interface LayoutResult {
  nodes: GraphNode[]
  edges: GraphEdge[]
}

/**
 * FR-1 — Layered topological-rank layout.
 *
 * Algorithm (hand-rolled, no dagre):
 *   1. Build adjacency from next-step / if_zero / if_nonzero / skip / substep edges.
 *   2. Detect & break loop substep back-edges (only legal cycle).
 *   3. Assign ranks via longest-path layering: rank(v) = max(rank(parent) + 1).
 *   4. Within each rank, x positions via parent-centroid heuristic (median sort, 2 passes).
 *   5. For each entry in `expandedWorkflows`, recurse into the sub-DAG layer-out and
 *      offset the result by parent's (x, y) + (0, NEXT_RANK_HEIGHT).
 *   6. For team-step fan-in: collect all teammate steps with the same `team` ref,
 *      route their out-edges to the corresponding team-wait node.
 *
 * Pure, deterministic, synchronous. Same input → byte-identical (nodes, edges).
 *
 * @param workflow         The workflow to lay out.
 * @param expandedWorkflows Optional map: teammate step id → Workflow (sub-workflow definition).
 *                          When present, those teammates render their sub-DAGs inline.
 */
export function buildLayout(
  workflow: Workflow,
  expandedWorkflows?: Map<string, Workflow>,
): LayoutResult
```

### Constants exposed for reuse (e.g. by FlowDiagram for fitView)

```ts
export const LAYOUT_RANK_HEIGHT = 160       // px between ranks (vertical)
export const LAYOUT_NODE_SPACING_X = 240    // px between siblings within a rank
export const LAYOUT_SUB_DAG_OFFSET_Y = 200  // px below parent for expanded sub-DAG
```

## Module: `viewer/src/lib/discover.ts` (extended — FR-6)

### Existing functions

```ts
// Existing — UNCHANGED signature; behavior unchanged for legacy callers.
export function discoverLocalWorkflows(projectPath: string): DiscoveredWorkflow[]

// Existing — UNCHANGED signature; behavior unchanged.
export function discoverFeedbackLoops(projectPath: string): {
  kilnInstalled: boolean
  loops: unknown[]
}

// Existing — UNCHANGED signature.
export function getLocalWorkflow(name: string, projectPath: string): DiscoveredWorkflow | null
```

### Extended: `DiscoveredWorkflow`

```ts
export interface DiscoveredWorkflow {
  name: string
  description: string
  path: string
  source: 'local' | 'plugin'
  plugin?: string
  stepCount: number
  steps: unknown[]
  localOverride: boolean
  // NEW: discovery origin. See Workflow.discoveryMode.
  discoveryMode?: 'installed' | 'source' | 'local'
}
```

### Revised: `discoverPluginWorkflows` (FR-6.1, FR-6.2)

```ts
/**
 * FR-6.1 — Now accepts an optional projectPath. Backwards compatible:
 *           when omitted, behavior is unchanged from the prior release.
 *
 * Behavior:
 *   1. Reads ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json — discoveryMode='installed'.
 *   2. If projectPath is provided, ALSO scans projectPath/plugin-* / for siblings.
 *      Each such directory is treated as a plugin install if it has
 *      .claude-plugin/plugin.json AND a workflows/ subdirectory.
 *      These workflows tag with discoveryMode='source'.
 *   3. Both 'installed' and 'source' versions of the same workflow may be present
 *      in the result (same `plugin`+`name` — caller dedupes if desired).
 *
 * @param projectPath Optional absolute path of a registered project. When provided,
 *                    triggers FR-6.2 source-checkout discovery.
 */
export function discoverPluginWorkflows(projectPath?: string): DiscoveredWorkflow[]
```

### NEW helper: `discoverSourcePluginWorkflows` (private — FR-6.2 implementation detail)

```ts
/**
 * FR-6.2 — Scan <projectPath>/plugin-*/ for plugin source checkouts.
 *
 * For each direct child directory matching `plugin-*`:
 *   - Skip if no <dir>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists.
 *   - Skip if no <dir>/workflows/ exists.
 *   - Read manifest.workflows + auto-scan workflows/ (same logic as
 *     discoverPluginWorkflowsFromDir).
 *   - Tag every result with discoveryMode='source'.
 *
 * Internal helper — exported only for unit testing.
 */
export function discoverSourcePluginWorkflows(projectPath: string): DiscoveredWorkflow[]
```

## Component prop contracts (informational — no signature changes required by audit, but call out for impl)

### `StepRow` (extended — FR-5.2)

```ts
// viewer/src/components/StepRow.tsx
export interface StepRowProps {
  step: Step
  index: number
  /** NEW: render-time diff status. Undefined = no diff context (default styling). */
  diffStatus?: 'added' | 'removed' | 'modified' | 'unchanged'
  /** NEW: when diffStatus === 'modified', the per-field diff to optionally expand. */
  fieldDiff?: FieldDiff[]
}
```

### `Sidebar` (extended — FR-3 + FR-4.1 + FR-5.1)

Adds props (or local state):
- search input value (string, controlled)
- step-type filter set (Set<StepType>)
- multi-selected workflow names (Set<string>) for diff
- per-workflow lint badge (Map<string, LintBadge>) — computed by parent at discovery time

### `RightPanel` (extended — FR-2.4 + FR-4.2 + FR-7.3)

Adds tabs: `Detail` (existing) and `Lint` (new). Lint tab renders LintIssue[] for the active workflow.

### `DiffView` (NEW — FR-5.2)

```ts
// viewer/src/components/DiffView.tsx
export interface DiffViewProps {
  left: Workflow
  right: Workflow
  diff: WorkflowDiff
  onClose: () => void
}
export default function DiffView(props: DiffViewProps): JSX.Element
```

| **impl-graph** | `lib/layout.ts`+`layout.test.ts` (NEW), `components/FlowDiagram.tsx`, `components/WorkflowNode.tsx`, `components/StepRow.tsx`, `app/viewer.css` (node rules), delete `plugin-wheel/skills/wheel-view/viewer.html` |
| **impl-shell** | `components/Sidebar.tsx`, `components/RightPanel.tsx`, `components/WorkflowDetail.tsx`, `components/DiffView.tsx` (NEW), `app/page.tsx`, `app/viewer.css` (shell rules) |
| **impl-data-layer** also owns | `plugin-wheel/tests/lint-fixture-broken.json` (NEW — committed alongside `lint.test.ts`) |
